info.title: TrackNote API
info.description: Time tracking application with notes and reporting capabilities

get.summary: Get user profile with organizations and projects
List all projects for the authenticated user

200.description: Timer stopped, returns the work entry

post.description: Atomically stops the current timer and immediately starts a new one. The current work entry is completed and a new one begins at the exact same moment.

post.summary: Create a work entry (manual or start timer)
post.description: Creates a work entry. If ended_at is provided, creates a completed manual entry. If ended_at is null/omitted, creates an active entry and starts the timer.

ended_at.description: If null, creates an active timer

put.description: Updates a work entry. Setting ended_at to null will make it an active entry (starts timer).
